title: DIMCP EP_37 #fishblood
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_37 #fishblood.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Welcome back to the show, dog is my co-pilot. I'm sitting here waiting on my friend to get back
[00:00:07.52] from delivering sushi to an apartment condominium apartment up some stories from this parking garage.
[00:00:19.60] If you've never seen a piece of sushi bleed it's because the fish is dead and it bled all out already.
[00:00:30.80] I don't know maybe there's some special to you. Sushi that's just a cup of fish blood but I've never seen
[00:00:41.28] that from where I'm from. It's a toss up actually not at all. I would definitely drink a cup of fish blood.
[00:00:53.04] Yeah, this for sure.
